{{Quote|I regret to say that your companion Darjeelai Swan died while fur-nishing the Yuuzhan Vong information. Is there anything you wish done with the body?|Nom Anor, to Thrackan Sal-Solo|<ref name="Ylesia" />}}
'''Darjeelai Swan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who lived during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="Ylesia" /> In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> she joined [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] on his journey to [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]] in order to have the [[Centerpoint Party]] and Corellia sign a peace accord with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. She was killed during an interrogation by the Yuuzhan Vong while Sal-Solo met with [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]].<ref name="Ylesia" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' {{1stm}}
